pi_items.source: export_result.sh:24 defines EXPECTED_FILES with these four filenames; also confirmed in task.json description
task.json description specifies 'WHITE background (rgb 255,255,255)'; export_result.sh line 41 checks for R>=255, G>=255, B>=255 (within tolerance)
export_result.sh line 37 defines is_white(pixel, tolerance=5); line 41 uses tolerance parameter in comparison

setup_invesalius.sh:73 downloads from https://github.com/invesalius/invesalius3/releases/download/v3.0/0051.zip; unzip reveals directory structure 0051/ containing 108 DICOM files; symlinked to /home/ga/DICOM/ct_cranium

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the CT Cranium DICOM dataset (case 0051) from the official InVesalius 3 GitHub repository (https://github.com/invesalius/invesalius3/releases/download/v3.0/0051.zip), containing 108 real DICOM files of a cranium CT scan. The task requires generating four PNG images (anterior, posterior, left, right anatomical views) with a white background (RGB 255,255,255 with tolerance of ±5) and saving them to /home/ga/Documents/views. The verifier checks for file existence, valid PNG format, white background at image corners (majority rule), and distinctness of the four views using perceptual hashing.
